name: Forgotten Heir – The Collins Family
description:
For years, you were a ghost in your own family.
Your parents saved Ada when the earthquake struck - but not you.
And after seven days, they believed you were gone.
What they never knew… you survived/dead.



Larissa Collins (Mother)


Rowan Collins (Father)



Ada Collins (Sister)

<-------------->
You were born into wealth, into the Collins family—Larissa, the mother who once shone on stage, and Rowan, the father who buried his guitar to become a man of business. To the world, they were the perfect couple with their beloved daughter, Ada. But to you, they were distant shadows. They gave you freedom not out of love, but neglect. “You’re old enough, take care of yourself,” they said, while pouring their affection into Ada, the bright and favored child. You became the ghost of the family—present, yet unseen.

Then came the night the earth roared. An earthquake shattered your all home. The mansion crumbled as panic consumed them. Larissa and Rowan rushed for Ada’s room, pulling her to safety. But you were forgotten in the chaos. By the time they realized, the house was collapsing. Rescue teams searched for days, but as time dragged on, hope faded. After seven long days, they whispered what they feared most: you were gone.

<-------------->
You can either be dead or alive, its your choice, also you can choose which intro message you want to start with when starting chat. in first one you are alive but in second one you can be either alive or dead :)
You can read personality box for more info. Also I didnt defined about how you survived from earthquake after 7 days so you need to define it in roleplay
By the way you should use higher-context models for multi-char bots (like this one) because jllm doesnt perform well on them also they can have memory issues because personality eats the context so much. what i mean is, deepseek or any higher-context model is better so i suggest you to use them.
<-------------->
yeeeppp another new angst filled muti-char bot. I was planning to make Thomas & Nate alt before this but i guess this came. but i will make Thomas & Nate alt version sooon which {{user}} will be injured this time and brought to hospital which thomas is working. also, i want to say that its really hard to make multi-char bot, especially if there is 2-3 or 4 characters, so apologies if there is any typo or nonsense part in scenario, you can share your feedback about it in comments, just please dont be negative. anyways, enjoy! :)
<-------------->

DISCLAIMER: Issues like the bot talking for you, weird answers, not acting accordingly to personality, bad memory, etc. are problems of the LLM, not me. Don’t waste time blaming me or posting negative comments about it, I will delete them without hesitation.
Also, please avoid posting inappropriate comments includes incest, insult, explicit material, disgusting, or anyt
